title: citrus medica f. sudachi
intro: Citrus medica f. sudachi, also known as Sudachi yuzu, is a small, evergreen tree native to Japan and a variety of the citron (Citrus medica). The medicinal properties of Citrus medica f. sudachi include its high vitamin C content, which makes it effective in boosting the immune system and fighting off infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. Citrus medica f. sudachi can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional Japanese medicine and cooking.
